skills.name: Smart Model Switching
skills.author: millibus
skills.description: Auto-route tasks to the cheapest Claude model that works correctly. Three-tier progression: Haiku → Sonnet → Opus. Classify before responding. HAIKU (default): factual Q&A, greetings, reminders, status checks, lookups, simple file ops, heartbeats, casual chat, 1-2 sentence tasks. ESCALATE TO SONNET: code >10 lines, analysis, comparisons, planning, reports, multi-step reasoning, tables, long writing >3 paragraphs, summarization, research synthesis, most user conversations. ESCALATE TO OPUS: architecture decisions, complex debugging, multi-file refactoring, strategic planning, nuanced judgment, deep research, critical production decisions. Rule: If a human needs >30 seconds of focused thinking, escalate. If Sonnet struggles with complexity, go to Opus. Save 50-90% on API costs by starting cheap and escalating only when needed.
skills.descriptionZh: 自动将任务路由至成本最低的可用Claude模型。三级递进：Haiku→Sonnet→Opus。先分类再响应。Haiku（默认）：事实问答、问候、提醒、状态检查、简单文件操作、闲聊、1-2句话任务。升级至Sonnet：超10行代码、分析对比、规划报告、多步推理、表格、超3段长文、总结研究。升级至Opus：架构决策、复杂调试、多文件重构、战略规划、深度研究、关键生产决策。规则：需人类专注思考超30秒则升级；Sonnet处理困难时转Opus。从低成本开始按需升级，节省50-90% API费用。
